screenSummary.playArea: The play area shows a ladybug that moves around a two-dimensional area. Velocity and acceleration vectors and a trace of its path can be shown.
screenSummary.controlArea: The controls choose how the ladybug moves — dragged by hand or following a chosen motion — toggle the velocity and acceleration vectors and the path trace, and record or replay the motion. A Reset All button returns the simulation to its starting state.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Drag the ladybug or choose a motion, then watch its velocity and acceleration vectors.

a11y.currentDetails: The ladybug is at position {{x}}, {{y}} meters, moving at {{speed}} meters per second. The simulation is {{state}}.

controls.ladybugHelp: Drag the ladybug to move it; recording starts automatically.
controls.remotePadHelp: Drag within the pad to set the selected quantity. Use the Position, Velocity, and Acceleration tabs to change the control mode.

trace.lineHelp: Trace shown as a continuous line.
